# Reedy Berg for Washington State House

> Official campaign website for Reedy Berg, Republican candidate for Washington State House, Legislative District 15, Position 2. Primary: August 4, 2026. General: November 3, 2026.

## Candidate

- **Name:** Reedy Berg
- **Office Sought:** Washington State House of Representatives, Legislative District 15, Position 2
- **Party:** Republican
- **Location:** Yakima Valley, Central Washington
- **Background:** Middle school history and civics teacher at Toppenish Middle School; former Yakima City Council member; former Deputy Mayor of Yakima; Yakima Valley native

## Top Issues

- **Empowering Parenthood** — Parents are the primary stakeholders in their children's upbringing. Reedy supports parental rights in education and opposes legislation that removes parents from decisions about their children's health and curriculum.
- **Repeal the Climate Commitment Act** — The CCA is a hidden gas tax that costs Yakima Valley families and farmers hundreds of dollars annually. Reedy supports repeal to lower fuel, food, and heating costs.
- **Tax Relief** — Opposes new taxes on income and working families. Supports reducing the tax burden on Central Washington households.
- **Agriculture** — Protecting Yakima Valley's agricultural economy and water rights. Opposes regulations that threaten farms and ranches.
- **Fix Homelessness** — Enforce existing laws, close open drug use, and restore public safety in Yakima.
- **Public Safety** — Back the badge. Support law enforcement funding and oppose policies that weaken public safety.

## Key Facts

- Legislative District 15 covers the Yakima Valley, including Yakima, Toppenish, Sunnyside, and surrounding communities
- Primary election: August 4, 2026
- General election: November 3, 2026
- Campaign committee: Reedy Berg for Washington
- Mailing address: 4001 Summitview Ave Ste 5 Mailbox 207, Yakima WA 98908
- Contact: info@reedyberg.com | (509) 255-7116
- Contributions are not tax deductible
- WA PDC Disclosure: https://www.pdc.wa.gov

## Pages

- [Home](https://reedyberg.com/) — Full campaign site with issues, biography, endorsements, and contact
- [Donate](https://reedyberg.com/donate) — Secure contribution page via Anedot

## About This Site

Built and maintained by Foresight Productions. Updated weekly through the 2026 election cycle.
